title: Angela Barnett
compiled_truth: Angela Barnett is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2001-11-14), Angela Barnett sent 35 and received 209 emails, totalling 244 interactions. Top correspondents: [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (35), [Regina Blackshear](people/regina-blackshear) (14), [Eve Puckett](people/eve-puckett) (12), [Lsharis](people/lsharis-msn) (12), [Diane Salcido](people/diane-salcido) (9).
